CONTENT.Career: On 9 January 2022, Al-Obaid joined Al-Hilal on a three-year deal. On 8 July 2022, he joined Al-Ettifaq on a one-year loan. On 8 September 2023, he joined Damac.
CONTENT.Honours: Al-QadsiahFirst Division: 2014–15Al-NassrPro League: 2018–19Saudi Super Cup: 2019, 2020Al-HilalPro League: 2021–22
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of match played 27 May 2024Statistics accurate as of match played 19 November 2019.

SUMMARY: Abdulrahman Ahmed Abdullah Al-Obaid (Arabic: عبد الرحمن أحمد عبد الله العبيد, born 30 April 1993) is a Saudi Arabian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Damac.
